title: Lead SEO Specialist at CaratLane Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at CaratLane Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with CaratLane Advisory Limited! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About CaratLane Advisory Limited:
CaratLane Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane Advisory Limited!
